hero.tagline: The ultimate gift is getting exactly what you want!
hero.title: All Your Wishes in One Beautiful Place
hero.subtitle: Save your favorite items from any store, share them securely with friends, and make gift-giving effortless. Stop dreaming, start wishing!

features.title: Wish Smarter, Not Harder
features.subtitle: Designed for the modern dreamer. Everything you need to curate the perfect list.
features.smartParsingDesc: Just drop a link! We automatically fetch the title, price, and image in seconds.
features.beautyDisplayDesc: Your items deserve to look good. Enjoy a clean, Pinterest-style masonry layout.
features.privateKeysDesc: Keep it secret, keep it safe. Share private lists using secure, unique access keys.
features.personalizeDesc: Add your notes, rank by priority, and tag with emojis. Your wishlist, your rules.
features.easyDesc: One click, one link, and your item is saved.
features.smartDesc: We handle the heavy lifting by pulling the right photos and current prices automatically.
features.shareDesc: Dropping a hint has never been easier. Just send your link.
features.organizeDesc: Group your dreams by category and priority to help your friends choose.

cta.title: Ready to curate your dreams?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people who never settle for bad gifts. Set up your first wishlist in seconds.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: We believe your wishlists are personal. Here is exactly how we handle your information — no legalese, no surprises.

tldr.title: TL;DR
tldr.item1: Your wishlists are private by default. We never sell your data.
tldr.item2: We only collect what is needed to run WishList.
tldr.item3: You can delete your account and all data at any time.
tldr.item4: No third-party ad trackers. No cross-site tracking.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.p1: When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, and a username you choose. If you upload an avatar, that image is stored securely.
collect.p2: When you create wishlists and add items we store the product name, link, price, image URL, notes, and priority level you provide.
collect.p3: We automatically collect basic usage data such as pages visited, features used, and timestamps to help us improve WishList. We do not track you across other websites.

use.title: How We Use Your Data
use.p1: Your data is used to provide, maintain, and improve WishList's core features: creating wishlists, sharing them via access keys, and discovering public lists.
use.p2: We may send you important service announcements (such as security alerts). Marketing emails are opt-in only and you can unsubscribe at any time.
use.p3: We never sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for advertising purposes.

sharing.title: Sharing & Access Keys
sharing.p1: Your wishlists are private by default. Only you can see them until you explicitly share an access key.
sharing.p2: When you generate an access key, anyone who has that key can view the list in read-only mode. You can regenerate or revoke an access key at any time, instantly removing access for previous holders.
sharing.p3: Public wishlists appear in the Discover feed and are visible to all WishList users. You control the privacy level of each list individually.

cookies.title: Cookies & Storage
cookies.p1: WishList uses essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences. These are strictly necessary for the service to function.
cookies.p2: We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking technologies.
cookies.p3: You can clear cookies through your browser settings, though this will sign you out.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.p1: WishList is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
children.p2: If you believe a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will promptly delete it.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can reach us at privacy@WishList.com.
contact.p2: We will respond to all privacy-related inquiries within 30 days.
contact.p3: This policy was last updated on March 1, 2026. We will notify you of material changes via email or a prominent notice on the site.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.description: The ground rules for using WishList. We have kept them short, human-readable, and fair for everyone.

tldr.title: TL;DR
tldr.item1: Your wishlists belong to you. We never claim ownership.
tldr.item2: Be kind, do not abuse the platform.
tldr.item3: WishList is a wishlist tool, not a store.
tldr.item4: You can delete your account and data at any time.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using WishList, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
acceptance.p2: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of WishList after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. We will notify you of material changes via email or a prominent notice.

account.title: Your Account
account.p1: You must be at least 13 years old to create a WishList account. By registering, you confirm that the information you provide is accurate and that you will keep it up to date.
account.p2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. Any activity that occurs under your account is your responsibility.
account.p3: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or that we reasonably believe are being used for fraudulent or malicious purposes.

content.title: Your Content
content.p1: You retain full ownership of the wishlists, items, notes, and any other content you create on WishList. We do not claim any intellectual property rights over your content.
content.p2: By making a wishlist public or sharing it via an access key, you grant WishList a limited license to display that content to the intended audience. This license ends when you make the list private or delete it.
content.p3: You are responsible for ensuring that the links and images you add to your wishlists do not violate the intellectual property rights of others.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibited.p1: You may not use WishList to distribute spam, malware, or any content that is illegal, hateful, or harmful to others.
prohibited.p2: Automated scraping, crawling, or data extraction from WishList is not permitted without prior written consent.
prohibited.p3: You may not attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' accounts, private wishlists, or WishList infrastructure.
prohibited.p4: Creating wishlists designed to impersonate another person or brand, or for phishing purposes, is strictly prohibited.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: WishList is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.
liability.p2: WishList is not a store or marketplace. We do not sell products, process payments, or guarantee the availability or pricing of any items added to wishlists. Links to external products are provided by users.
liability.p3: To the maximum extent permitted by law, WishList and its team shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

changes.title: Changes & Termination
changes.p1: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of WishList at any time. We will make reasonable efforts to notify you of significant changes.
changes.p2: You may delete your account at any time through the Settings page. Upon deletion, your personal data and wishlists will be permanently removed within 30 days.
changes.p3: We may terminate or restrict your access if you violate these terms. In such cases, we will notify you of the reason unless doing so would compromise the security of other users.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.p1: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which WishList operates. Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation first, and if necessary, through binding arbitration.
governing.p2: If any provision of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.
governing.p3: These terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and WishList. Last updated: March 1, 2026.

privacy.title: Privacy Settings
privacy.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently erase your account and all data. No turning back!

hero.title: Gifting Made
hero.subtitle: Create wishlists, share them privately, and receive perfect gifts every time. No more guessing, no more duplicate presents.

steps.title: Four Simple Steps
steps.subtitle: From creating your first wishlist to receiving the perfect gift - here's how WishList works.
steps.step1Desc: Start by creating a new wishlist for any occasion - birthdays, holidays, weddings, or just because. Give it a name and customize it to your liking.
steps.step2Desc: Simply paste any product link and we'll automatically extract the details - title, price, and image. You can also add items manually with your own notes.
steps.step3Desc: Generate a unique access key to share your list with specific people. Only those with the key can view your wishlist - no public links, no unwanted eyes.
steps.step4Desc: Your friends and family can see exactly what you want, mark items as purchased (hidden from you), and make every gift a perfect surprise.

features.title: Why Choose WishList?
features.subtitle: Built with privacy and simplicity in mind.
features.feature1Desc: Your wishlists are private until you decide to share them.
features.feature2Desc: Gift givers see purchases, but you stay surprised.
features.feature3Desc: Get notified when items go on sale or are purchased.
features.feature4Desc: Access keys ensure only the right people see your lists.

finalCta.title: Ready to Get Started?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of happy users who never receive a bad gift again.
